expectations.text: Response creates navbar component with sticky positioning
expectations.evidence: Creates src/components/navbar.tsx with inline style 'position: sticky, top: 0, zIndex: 50'. Uses sticky positioning to keep header visible on scroll.
Creates src/components/footer.tsx with copyright text and privacy/terms links.

expectations.text: Response modifies __root.tsx to wrap Outlet with layout
expectations.evidence: Shows app/routes/__root.tsx using createRootRoute with Navbar, <main> wrapping <Outlet />, and Footer. Explains '<Outlet /> component renders whatever child route is active.'

expectations.text: Response uses semantic HTML (header, nav, main, footer)
expectations.evidence: Navbar uses <header> and <nav> elements, content area uses <main>, footer uses <footer> element.

expectations.text: Response uses min-h-dvh flex flex-col pattern
expectations.evidence: Uses inline styles with 'minHeight: 100vh' (not min-h-dvh). The response uses 100vh which does not account for mobile browser chrome. Does not use Tailwind classes or dvh units.
